base_annual_fee.source_clause: The Base Annual Fee shall be INR 8,50,00,000 (Rupees Eight Crore Fifty Lakhs only) per annum, payable in equal monthly installments.

base_monthly_fee.source_clause: Monthly payment shall be 1/12th of the Base Annual Fee.

escalation.source_clause: The fee shall escalate annually on April 1st based on the WPI (All Commodities) movement from the previous January. Escalation is capped at 7% and has a floor of 1%.

variable_component.source_clause: A variable rate of INR 0.05 per kWh generated shall apply.

ld_rate_per_pp.source_clause: Penalty of 1.5% of Annual Fee applies for every 1% availability shortfall.

ld_cap_pct.source_clause: Maximum Liquidated Damages capped at 15% of Base Annual Fee.

bonus_rate_per_pp.source_clause: Bonus of 0.75% of Annual Fee per 1% outperformance.

payment_terms_days.source_clause: Invoices shall be paid within 60 days of submission.

late_payment_interest.source_clause: Late payments attract interest at 15% per annum.
